items.caption:
A split-screen showcasing two different garage organization systems available at the home depot. on the left, there is a garage with a black workbench featuring a pegboard with various tools and accessories hanging on it. below the workbench, there is a set of metal cabinets with drawers and shelves. the cabinets are labeled "husky steel garage cabinet set."

on the right, the image displays a garage with a white ceiling and a wooden door frame. inside, there is a garage with a black and silver storage system, labeled "gladiator." the system includes cabinets with drawers and shelves, and there are additional storage units with wheels on the floor. the cabinets are neatly organized, and the garage appears clean and well-maintained. the text "garage organization with the home depot" is overlaid on the image, indicating the source of the storage solutions.
